name: AdvanceTC Limited
summary: AdvanceTC Limited designs, develops, and commercializes mobile wireless computing and telecommunication devices worldwide. The company offers mobile computing devices with integrated telephony, voice calling, SMS/MMS/IM, VOIP, and video conferencing capabilities under the MAGIC brand; and a Windows OS microcomputer integrated with cellular telephony capabilities. It also provides software and applications services; and Xplore X7, a satellite smartphone. The company was incorporated in 2005 and is based in Sydney, Australia.
